must_detect.matched_text:
incident summary: auroramart berhad (main market issuer, stock code 0A00) — operational cybersecurity update
on 14 may 2026, our order-management staging cluster experienced unauthorised access; a public notification was posted on 16 may under main market listing requirements para 9.03; exchange announcement ref: KE/IR/2026-XYZ-014
internal ref inc-26-0514; preliminary cause: misconfigured api token on a test server; production systems unaffected; downtime limited to uat
based on forensics completed to date, no pdpa-sensitive personal data from live systems were accessed; sample test records contained dummy values only; no identity-card scans or payment card numbers were present
we have engaged netshield my centre and lodged a report with the local precinct police; general helpline: 03-0000 0000; security mailbox: secops@auroramart.invalid
reminder for teams: changeover checklist in confluence, please update jira ticket it-ops-7721; next steps meeting wed 3pm; wellness spa day vouchers remain valid
esg note: customer service response times were maintained; no safety incidents at kuala selantan hub; e-scrap to be disposed via a licensed recycler on 21 may
financing covenant review: the incident does not constitute, and shall not be deemed to constitute, a material adverse change or material adverse effect under the syndicated facility agreement dated 2 january 2025 with evergreen capital bank berhad
